---
title: "Your Turn"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: html
---

Complete the following tasks:

1.  Pull from GitHub (this won't do anything now, but it's a good workflow habit when you open a project)
2.  Change "Your Name" in the author to your name
3.  Save your file
4.  Commit your change
5.  Push the file to GitHub
6.  Go to GitHub and check that the file has changed
